response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across architectures and languages, including Linux and Python-adjacent ecosystems, but lacks explicit UML expertise, formal project management credentials, and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level consulting role requiring client advisory and compliance leadership.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with real-world GIS and tooling projects
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Node.js, DLang, and cloud-native stacks
Strong mentorship and workshop experience in TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — falls far short of C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, architectural modeling, or requirements management in resume
Lacks documented experience in client-facing technical advisory or IT security/compliance leadership
